stemHtml: Upon first contact with their destination aerodrome, the crew of a jet aeroplane is informed to expect a few holds due to high traffic. What can the crew do to increase their aircraft's maximum endurance?

options.a: Cruise with V<sub>MAX RANGE</sub> in order to increase the fuel mileage.
options.b: Climb to the optimum altitude in order to increase specific range.
options.c: Cruise with V<sub>MD</sub> in order to minimise fuel used per unit of time.
options.d: Request a continuous descent in order to reduce the thrust setting.
